free_text: Valence and inner proton hole states in In-119 via the
Sn-120, thickness of 130-mg/cm**2, was used as target.
The outgoing deuterons have been momentum
analyzed with the QMG/2-spectrograph and detected in
the focal plane of the spectrograph with a multi-wire
drift chamber. The obtained overall energy resolution
was typically 20 keV at E(d)=51 MeV.
.The error is reported by authors on fig.
